(23·11·1926). ft. Gopi Krishna (31·5·1903). Morarji Desai and many
other eminent personalities on whom greatness was not thrust but
who attained it by dint of their hard efforts and merit. Certainly, Sakata
Yoga has not overtaken them.
Readers may be surprised to learn that ~atars like Ganesha had
Sakata Y()ga glaring in his birth chart. Jesus Christ too had it. Among
others. matinee idol Raj Kapoor; his actor-brother Sl\ashi Kapoor and
Oevanand were born with Sakata Yoga in their birth charts.
likewise. Gajakesari Yoga is also glaring in the birth charts of some
avatars and noblemen. Rama, and his younger brother. Bharata. Ravana.
8udha. GeJru Hanak. Harishchandra, Alexandar. Madan Mohan Malaviya.
Subhas Chandra 8ose. Lokmanya Balgangadhar Tilak. former US
Presidents, Eisenhower, Kennedy and Ford; Sheikh Mujib of 8ang1a Desh.
Queen Ei.zabeth (II), Hitler, and noted film artists including Madhubala.
